pushBell.encourage: 룸메이트가 지출·일정·목록·할 일을 추가할 때 알림을 켜 두면 놓치지 않습니다.
pushBell.hintDenied: 권한이 거부되었습니다. 브라우저 설정에서 이 사이트 알림을 허용하세요.
pushBell.hintFailed: 업데이트하지 못했습니다. 연결을 확인하거나 설치된 앱(PWA)에서 다시 시도하세요.

calendarFeed.title: 공유 캘린더
calendarFeed.subtitle: 이 피드를 구독하면 일정이 동기화됩니다(일회성 가져오기 아님).
calendarFeed.manualHint: 버튼이 앱을 열지 않으면 아래 HTTPS 링크를 복사해 설정의 «URL로 추가/구독»에 붙여넣으세요.
calendarFeed.copyError: 복사할 수 없습니다. 필드를 선택해 수동으로 복사하세요.
calendarFeed.rotateConfirm: 재생성 시 이전 구독이 무효화됩니다(Google/Apple 업데이트 필요). 계속할까요?
calendarFeed.security: 집 밖으로 링크를 공유하지 마세요. 링크가 있으면 누구나 이 일정을 구독할 수 있습니다.

settings.title: 설정
settings.intro: 푸시 알림을 범주별로 관리합니다. 참여 중인 모든 집에 적용됩니다. 본인 행동에는 푸시가 가지 않습니다.
settings.deviceBody: 브라우저 또는 PWA에서 알림을 켜세요. 아래는 다른 사람이 행동할 때 받을 내용만 걸러냅니다.
settings.vapidOn: 허용하려면 상단의 종 아이콘을 사용하세요. 체크는 받을 알림 유형만 고릅니다.
settings.vapidOff: 서버에 푸시가 설정되지 않았습니다(VAPID 키 없음). 관리자에게 문의하세요.
settings.categoriesBody: 원하지 않는 범주를 끕니다. 변경은 이후 이벤트에 적용됩니다.

case.title: 공간 동기화
case.intro: 새 집을 만들거나 룸메이트가 공유한 코드로 참여하세요.
case.empty: 아직 집에 속해 있지 않습니다. 만들거나 코드로 참여하세요.

casaHome.intro: Summary of expenses, balances, calendar, lists and tasks. Use the menu above for full sections.
casaHome.balancesHint: Positive = you paid more than your share; negative = you still need to catch up.
casaHome.settlementHint: Fewest transfers between housemates; details and recording under Expenses.
casaHome.balanced: Balances are even: no transfer needed.

expensesPage.balancesTransfersHint: Recorded transfers update the balance (they are not shared expenses).
expensesPage.balanced: Balances are even: no transfer needed.
expensesPage.registerTransfersHint: Record each movement under “Transfer between housemates” below so balances update.
expensesPage.ledgerEmpty: No expenses yet. Add one on the left.
expensesPage.settleHowBody: Based on current balances, this is a sequence with the fewest possible transfers to bring everyone toward zero: with n people with non-zero balance you need at most n − 1 movements.
expensesPage.settleHowHint: Positive balance = paid more than their share and should receive; negative = still owes. Each row is who should send money to whom.
expensesPage.transferSectionHint: Record a bank transfer or cash from one person to another to settle up, without creating a shared expense.

settlement.balancedBody: No extra transfers are needed to settle accounts for recorded expenses and transfers.
settlement.moreOne: + one more step on the Expenses page
settlement.moreMany: + {{n}} more steps on the Expenses page
settlement.registerHint: Record each movement under “Transfer between housemates” below: balances update and the plan recalculates.

forms.createHouseIntro: You will become the admin and get an invite code to share with housemates.
forms.joinIntro: Ask whoever created the home on the portal for the code.

tasksPage.empty: No tasks yet. Add one to organize chores.

listsPage.title: Shopping lists
listsPage.empty: No lists yet. Create one to share groceries.

membersPage.title: Member management
membersPage.intro: The owner manages transferring the role. Supervisors can invite and remove standard members. Invites and ownership transfer use email.
membersPage.inviteHint: Send an invite link valid 7 days. The person must sign in with the same email.
membersPage.transferHint: Choose a member already in the home. They will get an email to accept or decline. Until they accept, you stay the admin.
membersPage.msgTransferSent: Request sent: the recipient will get a confirmation email.

landing.heroBadge: Shared home · less friction · more clarity
landing.heroLead: Convivia is your home’s digital hub: expenses, calendar, lists and chores in one place — built for roommates and families who want quick decisions and no lingering IOUs.
landing.heroLi1: No spreadsheets to maintain by hand
landing.heroLi2: Same data for everyone, updated in real time
landing.heroLi3: On your phone as an app (Android and iPhone)
landing.heroCtaSecondary: Log in to your account: create or manage your homes
landing.heroFootnote: No hidden cost to get started: create homes, invite members and use core features right away.
landing.cardTitle: One dashboard for the whole home
landing.cardHintRest: after sign-in, create a home and share the invite code in your group chat — you’re set in minutes.
landing.trust1Desc: Professional hosting, backups and solid security practices.
landing.trust2Desc: Comfortable one-handed UI and installable to your Home screen.
landing.trust3Desc: Each home is separate: you only see households you belong to.
landing.featuresLead: Everything you need to live together without losing the thread: fewer messy threads, clearer decisions.
landing.howLead: Three steps from chaos to routine.
landing.whyLead: Roommate friction often comes from scattered info: who paid the shop, who remembers the bill, who does laundry. Convivia puts everything in one calendar and one money ledger — so everyone knows what to do and what they owe, without asking every time.
landing.whyLi1: Less stress: percentages and balances calculated for you.
landing.whyLi2: More fairness: everyone sees the same figures and dates.
landing.whyLi3: More speed: open the app from Home and log in a few taps.
landing.faq1Q: Do I need to install an app?
landing.faq1A: You can use Convivia in the browser. On phones you can also add it to your Home screen: it opens full screen like a native app (recommended for daily use).
landing.faq2Q: Do my personal events end up in the home calendar?
landing.faq2A: No. The home calendar is separate: you can subscribe to it from Google or Apple Calendar as an extra calendar, so you see personal and group commitments together.
landing.faq3Q: How many homes can I have?
landing.faq3A: You can create or join multiple homes (e.g. student flat and family): from “My homes” you switch in one tap.
landing.finalLead: Create an account, open your first home and invite who you live with. In minutes you stop chasing messages and start using one place to get organized.
landing.finalCtaLogin: Log in to your account: create or manage your homes
landing.footerLegal: Convivia — shared organization for your home. Data hosted securely; HTTPS recommended in production.
landing.step1Title: Create an account and a home
landing.step1Text: Sign up in seconds, name your household and get the invite code for roommates.
landing.step2Text: Share the code: everyone gets the same expenses, calendar, lists and chores.
landing.step3Title: Use from browser or as an app
landing.step3Text: Open Convivia on your phone and add it to your Home screen: one tap away, even offline to browse.
landing.feature0Desc: Log who paid, split equally or by percentages (with remainder hints up to 100%). See who owes whom at a glance.
landing.feature1Desc: Attach a receipt photo: the app can suggest a total from recognized text. Always double-check before saving.
landing.feature2Desc: Shared events with month and week views. All-day or timed: the home stays aligned on shifts, bills and appointments.
landing.feature3Desc: Each home has a dedicated subscribed calendar (private link): group events appear next to your personal calendar on your phone.
landing.feature4Desc: Lists by room or shop: add items, check off in real time and avoid misses when someone goes to the store.
landing.feature5Desc: Assign who does what (cleaning, admin, shifts): visible status so nothing stays pending.

authLogin.title: Log in
authLogin.subtitle: Welcome back to Convivia
authLogin.registeredBanner: Account created. We sent a confirmation email: open the link, then come back here to sign in.
authLogin.resetBanner: Password updated. You can sign in now.

authRegister.title: Create account
authRegister.subtitle: Join Convivia and sync your home with roommates.
authRegister.subtitleInviteSuffix: You’re creating this account to accept an email invite: after registration confirm your email, then open the invite link from your inbox again.

authForms.name: Name
authForms.errorUnverified: You still need to confirm your email. Check your inbox (including spam) or request a new link below.
authForms.resendOk: If the account exists and isn’t verified, we’ve sent the link again.
authForms.lockedEmailHint: The email is fixed to the home invite. If it’s not yours, ask for a new invite to the correct address.

invitePage.invalidBody: The URL is missing a token or the link is no longer valid.

transferPage.invalidBody: The link has expired, was already handled, or is incomplete.

verifyEmailPage.title: Confirm email
verifyEmailPage.invalidHint: Invalid link. Make sure you copied the full address from the email, or request a new confirmation from the sign-in page.
verifyEmailPage.successBanner: Your account is active. You can now sign in with email and password.

passwordRequestPage.title: Forgot password
passwordRequestPage.subtitle: We’ll email you a link to choose a new password.
passwordRequestPage.lead: Enter your account email: if it exists, you’ll receive a link to choose a new password.

passwordNewPage.title: New password
passwordNewPage.subtitle: Choose a strong password (at least 8 characters).

passwordResetForm.doneMessage: If that email is registered, you’ll receive instructions shortly. Check your spam folder too.

houseInvite.title: Home invite
houseInvite.lead: Sign in or create an account with the same email as the invite.
houseInvite.intro: You’ve been invited to join «{{houseName}}». The invite is for {{inviteEmail}}.
houseInvite.leadLogin: Sign in or create an account with the invite email.
houseInvite.wrongAccount: You’re signed in as {{sessionEmail}}. Sign out and sign in with {{inviteEmail}}, or create a new account with that email.

houseTransfer.title: Ownership transfer
houseTransfer.leadBefore: You are about to become the home
houseTransfer.intro: {{fromName}} proposes you become administrator (owner) of «{{houseName}}». If you accept, the current administrator becomes a regular member.
houseTransfer.wrongRecipient: This request is for another account. Sign in with the recipient’s email.

casaHomeQuick.expensesDesc: Balances, history and new shared spending

pwa.installBody: Install Convivia on your phone to open it full screen like an app.

expenseForm.equalHint: Equal split among selected participants. For custom percentages or amounts use the Expenses page.

moneyTransferForm.needTwoMembers: At least two members are required to record a transfer.

addExpenseForm.receiptHint: Photo of the receipt; you can try “Read total from receipt” below.
addExpenseForm.receiptLongHint: Attach a photo (images up to 20 MB); you can use “Read total” to fill the amount (OCR is not always perfect).
addExpenseForm.equalHint: Equal split among selected participants. For custom percentages or amounts use the Expenses page.
addExpenseForm.errorAmountParticipants: Enter a valid total amount and select participants first.
addExpenseForm.errorOcrNone: Could not read a total from the receipt. Enter the amount manually.
addExpenseForm.errorOcrRead: Error reading the image. Try again or enter the amount manually.
addExpenseForm.percentFooterHint: When you change participants, percentages update equally; then you can fine-tune.
addExpenseForm.customIntro: Enter each person's share: the sum must match the expense total exactly.

errors.cannotRemoveSelf: To leave the home use a dedicated leave flow (coming soon). Here you can only remove others.

errors.ownerCannotBeRemoved: The owner cannot be removed. Transfer ownership first.

errors.emailMustMatchInvite: The email must match the home invite.
